input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing tests already configure --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED for some reflective Jackson/JDK coverage; preserve that existing scaffold setting if regenerating in place, but no new setup is indicated.

Jackson 2.19.2 behavior shaded into parquet-jackson 1.16.0 may differ from older tested versions, so generated tests should avoid hard-coding expectations from 1.12.2 without verifying current behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: parquet-jackson 1.16.0 is a shaded Jackson bundle with no runtime transitive dependencies or external services; normal in-process ObjectMapper/JsonFactory style tests can reach meaningful coverage without extra dependencies, Docker, or environment setup. The reported failure is an assertion/behavior mismatch in an existing enum introspection test, not missing setup.
